description:
A checkbox in various styles.  NOTE: Checkbox does not have a
vertical presentation - it's shown as the checkbox followed by the label.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS class(es) for the rendered checkbox indicator

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description (help text) displayed below the checkbox, wired to aria-describedby

props.name: descriptionClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered description [text-base-content/60 text-sm]

props.name: errors
props.description: Optional errors component to display below checkbox field

props.name: errorsClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for any rendered errors [bg-error text-error-content]

props.name: fieldsetClassName
props.description: Optional CSS for the outer fieldset wrapper

props.name: label
props.description: Visual label for this checkbox field

props.name: name
props.description: Checkbox field name (also used as id)
